_comment: Optional overrides for the bronze loader. The notebook runs fully without this file; everything here is optional. Pass its abfss/path via the `config_path` parameter, or leave blank to use defaults.
_comment_include: If non-empty, ONLY these bronze table names are processed (after discovery). Names match the sanitized folder name -> brz table name.
_comment_exclude: Bronze table names to skip entirely.
_comment_change_types: Which CDF _change_type values to keep on incremental loads. Default keeps the full change log. To keep only current-state rows, use ["insert", "update_postimage"].
_comment_string_len: Default NVARCHAR length for every column. Must stay <= the clustered columnstore limit so the uniform CCI always applies.

table_overrides._comment: Per-table overrides keyed by bronze table name.
